title: Declare a Terraform Resource
description:
## Write Infrastructure as Code

Terraform describes infrastructure in HCL `resource` blocks of the form `resource "<type>" "<name>" { ... }`.

**Your task:** write a file at **`/root/main.tf`** declaring a resource of type **`local_file`** named **`greeting`** that has a **`content`** argument and a **`filename`** argument.

```hcl
resource "local_file" "greeting" {
  content  = "Hello from Terraform"
  filename = "/tmp/greeting.txt"
}
```

> 💡 No `terraform` binary is needed — this checks that your HCL declares the resource block correctly.

hints.title: Write the resource block
hints.body: A resource block names a type and a local name, then sets its arguments inside braces.

validation.description: Checks that /root/main.tf declares the local_file.greeting resource with a content argument.
